title: Lab: Audit an Emergency-Training Video Review
summary: Lab: Audit an Emergency-Training Video Review retrieves prior skills in an original missing equivalents in a responder training review scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply accessible names descriptions, accessible media equivalents in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real missing equivalents in a responder training review artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
